objective: Minimize NS(5)-step ms vs the champion FusedMuon NS (cuBLAS), per shape, at PARITY PASS and peak<=compiled. Beat fused ~1.8x and beat all three baselines (compiled/triu/fused) as the matrix scales.
eval: .autoresearch/bench_symmul.py (4-way; algorithm frozen, only symmetric GEMMs vary)

bars.parity: hard gate (max|Δ| < tol, SV mean in [0.80,1.20], NaN-free)

regime: B (large-matrix square sweep is headline; batched-small 512^2 is the BiBo regression guard)
tried_ideas: v1: batched triangle+transpose-copy symmul replacing both symmetric NS GEMMs; polynomial as explicit axpy; cuBLAS dispatch below dim 1024
stop_target: amalg >= 1.8x fused on dim>=2048, parity PASS, peak<=compiled, no batched-small regression
loop_mode: human-gated: user runs bench on RTX PRO 6000, pastes results; agent diagnoses + generates next atomic candidate
